message:
style: rustfmt auto-cleanup across doctor/sync/storage after recent feature work

Rustfmt-only wrapping touch-ups following the tombstone-preservation and
JSONL validator changes:

- src/cli/commands/doctor.rs: rewrap `create_issue` call and the
  `serde_json::to_string` let-binding in the doctor tests.
- src/cli/commands/sync.rs: rewrap `restore_tombstones(...)` call in
  the delegated-rebuild recovery branch; rewrap `assert!` and
  `assert_eq!` layouts in the dependency-preservation test.
- src/storage/sqlite.rs: collapse `replace_dirty_issue_marker` signature
  back to a single line now that the body fits the column budget.

No behaviour changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
